examples: The Wu Method was applied to the forward displacement analysis of planar basic kinematic chains. A 7-link Barravo truss which is associated with 6-link and 9-joint Assur groups was studied.
The connection forms of all R joints of the Assur groups in the assembly forms are permutated step by step following the proposed connection constrains and isomorphism is detected in the process.
This paper presents a new method with driver transformation for the kinematic analysis of the planar mechanisms in high class, based on the Assur group theory and kinematic superposition principle.
